title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Marks & Spencer India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Marks & Spencer India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
